evals.prompt: I built a time tracking app by myself and want to launch it on SoloPush to get my first users. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Submission checklist with listing optimization, solo maker story emphasis, and multi-platform launch recommendation

assertions.name: submission_checklist
assertions.description: Covers listing preparation: description, screenshots, URL, founder story

assertions.name: solo_story
assertions.description: Emphasizes telling the personal solo maker narrative as a differentiator on SoloPush

assertions.name: engagement_strategy
assertions.description: Suggests engaging with other makers' products and sharing externally to drive upvotes

assertions.name: multi_platform
assertions.description: Recommends pairing SoloPush with other launch platforms (ProductBurst, MicroLaunch, Product Hunt)

evals.prompt: I want to submit my product to SoloPush mainly for the SEO backlink. Is it worth it?
evals.expected_output: Confirms backlink value with DR and link type details, recommends multi-platform backlink strategy

assertions.name: backlink_details
assertions.description: States DR46-47 do-follow backlink (free, automatic with listing)

assertions.name: link_type_caveat
assertions.description: Warns about conflicting reports on dofollow vs nofollow and suggests verifying after submission

assertions.name: multi_platform_seo
assertions.description: Recommends listing on multiple platforms for maximum backlink coverage (ProductBurst, MicroLaunch, LaunchingNext, SideProjectors)

assertions.name: genuine_listing
assertions.description: Advises creating a real listing (not a stub) for best SEO value

evals.prompt: Should I launch on SoloPush or Product Hunt first? I'm a solo developer.
evals.expected_output: Comparison of both platforms with recommendation to use SoloPush first as low-pressure test before Product Hunt

assertions.name: pressure_comparison
assertions.description: Compares PH 24-hour high-pressure window vs SoloPush no-pressure anytime listing

assertions.name: audience_fit
assertions.description: Notes SoloPush community specifically values solo makers while PH is general

assertions.name: traffic_reality
assertions.description: Notes Product Hunt has significantly higher traffic and backlink value (DR91 vs DR46-47)

assertions.name: sequenced_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends SoloPush first for testing, then Product Hunt with refined messaging
